description: Translate the entire vue-lynx documentation site from English to Simplified Chinese (zh-CN)

rules: Translate ALL prose to natural, idiomatic Chinese
Keep code blocks, URLs, file paths, and component names in English
Preserve all Markdown/MDX formatting and components
Translate frontmatter title and description; keep slug, sidebar_position unchanged
Technical terms: component→组件, props→props, state→状态, lifecycle→生命周期, template→模板, directive→指令, slot→插槽, main thread→主线程

userStories.title: Setup i18n infrastructure with Rspress config
acceptanceCriteria: Read Rspress i18n docs at https://rspress.rs/guide/basic/i18n to understand configuration
Update website/rspress.config.ts to add i18n config with locales: ['en', 'zh']

Update website/rspress.config.ts themeConfig to add localized sidebar for zh (translate sidebar text: Quick Start→快速开始, What is VueLynx?→什么是 VueLynx?, Vue Compatibility→Vue 兼容性, Main Thread Script→主线程脚本, Tutorials→教程, Product Gallery→商品画廊, Product Swiper→商品轮播, 7GUIs Benchmark→7GUIs 基准测试, Ecosystem→生态系统, Vue Router→Vue Router, Pinia→Pinia, Vue Query→Vue Query, Tailwind CSS→Tailwind CSS, VueLynx Testing Library→VueLynx 测试库, API Reference→API 参考)
Update website/rspress.config.ts themeConfig to add localized nav for zh (Guide→指南)
Update website/i18n.json to add zh translations for all existing keys (Preview→预览, QRCode→二维码, Files→文件, etc.)
Add website/_meta.json or equivalent for locale labels (en: English, zh: 简体中文)
Start dev server: cd website && pnpm dev (background)
Browser verify: open http://localhost:5173 with dev-browser
Browser verify: language switcher appears in header/navbar
Browser verify: click language switcher shows both English and 简体中文 options
Browser verify: sidebar items display correctly in both languages when switching

userStories.title: Translate index.mdx
acceptanceCriteria: Verify: contains Chinese with grep -P '[\u4e00-\u9fff]' website/docs/zh/index.mdx
Verify: paragraph count matches source (wc -l comparison, excluding code blocks)
Verify: all MDX components preserved (compare <Component patterns between files)
Browser verify: open http://localhost:5173/zh/ with dev-browser skill
Browser verify: language switcher works, can toggle to English version

userStories.title: Translate guide/introduction.mdx
acceptanceCriteria: Verify: paragraph/section count matches source (no missing sections)
Verify: all MDX components (<Tabs>, <Tab>, <CodeBlock>, etc.) preserved
Verify: all code blocks unchanged from source
Browser verify: can switch between zh and en versions

userStories.title: Translate guide/quick-start.mdx
acceptanceCriteria: Verify: CLI commands in code blocks unchanged

Browser verify: tables render correctly, can switch to en

userStories.title: Final build and full verification
acceptanceCriteria: Run: cd website && pnpm build (must exit 0)
Verify: all 13 zh pages exist in dist
Browser verify: navigate through all zh pages via sidebar
Browser verify: every page can switch between zh and en
Commit all changes with message 'feat: add Chinese (zh-CN) documentation'

userStories.title: Translate home page features component
acceptanceCriteria: Update featuresConfig to use { en: string, zh: string } structure for title and desc fields
Add in component: const lang = useLang() as 'en' | 'zh'
Update render to use item.title[lang] and item.desc[lang]
- Powered by Vue 3 → Vue 3 驱动
- Full support for the Composition API... → 完整支持组合式 API、单文件组件和响应式系统——你已经熟悉并喜爱的 Vue 3 API。
- Made for Lynx → 为 Lynx 量身定做
- Dual-threaded Vue tailor-made for Lynx... → 基于 Lynx 量身定做的双线程 Vue，延续 Lynx 的原生 UI 响应性和主线程脚本能力。
- Compatible with Vue Ecosystem → Vue 生态兼容
- Bring your favorite Vue libraries... → 带上你喜爱的 Vue 库，在 Lynx 上享受丰富的 Vue 生态。
Browser verify: open http://localhost:5173/ and http://localhost:5173/zh/
Browser verify: features section shows English on /en/ or / and Chinese on /zh/
Commit with message 'feat: add Chinese translation for home features component'

userStories.title: Translate home page showcase component
acceptanceCriteria: Update showCaseList items to use { en, zh } for title and desc
Add const lang = useLang() as 'en' | 'zh' in component
Update section title 'Try it for yourself' to use i18n: { en: 'Try it for yourself', zh: '亲自体验' }
Update section desc 'Experience true native feel...' to { en: ..., zh: '体验真正的原生质感、瞬时启动和丝滑交互。' }
Update 'Learn by doing' link text to { en: 'Learn by doing', zh: '边做边学' }
- Two-Column Waterfall Gallery → 双列瀑布流画廊
- Cover everything you need... → 覆盖使用 Vue Lynx 开发所需的一切知识。
- Product Detail with Carousel → 带轮播的商品详情页
- Deep dive into main thread... → 通过构建一个高响应性的轮播组件，深入学习主线程脚本。
Update link hrefs to be locale-aware: use useLang to prepend /zh when lang === 'zh'
Browser verify: open http://localhost:5173/ shows English
Browser verify: open http://localhost:5173/zh/ shows Chinese for showcase section
Commit with message 'feat: add Chinese translation for home showcase component'

userStories.title: Fix features component links to be locale-aware
acceptanceCriteria: The actions array has internal links like /guide/routing, /guide/pinia, /guide/data-fetching
These need to prepend /zh/ when lang === 'zh'
Update link rendering: if link starts with '/', prepend locale prefix (lang === 'zh' ? '/zh' : '')
Browser verify: on /zh/, clicking Vue Router link goes to /zh/guide/routing
Browser verify: on /, clicking Vue Router link goes to /guide/routing
Commit with message 'fix: make features internal links locale-aware'

userStories.title: Translate home page banner and fix footer credits
acceptanceCriteria: - Start building with → 开始使用
- Change from 'Vue Lynx Authors' to 'Xuan Huang (huxpro)'
- Format: © 2026 Xuan Huang (huxpro). All Rights Reserved.
Browser verify: open http://localhost:5173/ and http://localhost:5173/zh/
Browser verify: banner shows English on / and Chinese on /zh/
Browser verify: Quick Start link goes to correct locale path
Browser verify: footer shows correct credits
Commit with message 'feat: translate banner and fix footer credits'
